properties.displayName: Stepped timer loops or exponential backoff used as long delay
properties.description: Detect patterns indicative of scripted stepped waits or exponential backoff loops (incremental sleep/ping loops) used to extend execution time beyond sandbox limits.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "for(" or ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "Start-Sleep" or ScriptBlockText|contains|all has "$i++") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep ($i)" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds $i" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds ($i *")
